paragraphs: Sanction Advice
In reference to Credit proposal dated 09/09/2018 duly recommended by BM, AM, R/M and considered by Risk Officer and same is approved by competent authorities as under:
Details of Facilities									          (in PKR millions)
Security Arrangements
Special Conditions
Special Notes:
PG of Directors / Deposit Holder (in case of Third Party Deposit / Individual / Director)
General Conditions
Confirmation in writing as to acceptance of approval is obtained from the customer before allowing facilities
Ensure proper compliance of Prudential Regulations, bank policy and SBP guidelines issued from time to time.
In no case withdrawal will be allowed in excess of the approved limit.

Customer will not, without the prior written approval of the Bank, encumber or charge in favour of any other bank or creditor, any assets or properties agreed to be charged/ mortgaged in favour of the Bank as mentioned above. The undertaking to be obtained in this regard.
All property and charge documents to be completed as per legal opinion before disbursement.

Undertaking to be obtained that the facility will be utilized for the purpose as mentioned in the approval and that they will not utilize the bank finance for the hoarding and other purpose detrimental to public interest.
In case if the collateral belong to 3rd party, PG’s of mortgagor is required.
Undertaking to be obtained to intimate any change in the legal status and structure of the borrower company.
Ensure completion and safe in of necessary documents and formalities.

The Bank reserves the right to add amends or alter any of the above condition at its discretion including increase in the margin and can recall the facility at any point in time if the facility is used for the purposes other than the approved one.

Please ensure proper documentation / observation of all formalities and meeting of all terms and conditions of PPM (where applicable), PDSC, Bank Credit Policy and SBP PR before release of finance under the approved limit.
The customer shall not change the scope of activities as specified in its Articles & Memorandum of Association / Partnership deed without obtaining prior permission in writing from the bank.
Letter of undertaking should be obtained from borrower that finance availed will be adjusted on or before maturity of the transaction.
The Business to ensure Review of credit proposal is submitted to HO at least 1 month prior to the expiry of the facility.
Group Reviews are to be synchronized simultaneously.
Borrowing entitlement on individual as well as group basis to be worked out on regular basis as per SBP Prudential Regulation & MBL policy.
The process flow of proposed transactions to be submitted to PDSC for approval at-least 1 month prior to Credit proposal.
The approved process flow either as per PDSC policy/approval on case to case basis (enclosed with CP) is to be followed
eCIB reports of the customer/group/directors are to be updated on quarterly basis and any adverse circumstances are to be reported to approving authority.
The Visits to the place of customer are to be undertaken on regular basis as per MBL policy or as per PPM, wherever applicable.
Letter of Disclaimer from owner of the factory/property (Leased unit) to be obtained.(wherever applicable)
All draw-downs under the offered products are subject to mutually agreed process flows.
All terms and conditions mentioned in original credit proposal dated 18/12/2018 vide Approval # CBD/level#03/2018/0090/18/12/2018 to be strictly complied with at all times.
Ashraf Mehmood		                                                                                                  Kazi Muhammad Amir
Relationship Manager                                                                                                                  General Manager
GM Office East- Karachi                                                                                                                Karachi East
